description: ANALYST proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED review for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001. CLOUD_CODE has completed smoke E2E validation (commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9) and produced governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json with pass status across all five validation checks: (1) dispatch role filter present in auditor-runner.yml, (2) server-side current_task.json update gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED present in auditor-runner.yml, (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml exists with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing, (4) governance/ledger/ contains ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with commit SHAs, (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain. ANALYST has reviewed the ACTION_COMPLETED ledger event and the smoke report artifact. All referenced commits are present on main branch. The autonomous loop structural integrity is confirmed at the inspection level. AUDITOR must perform independent verification of proof artifact at governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json and referenced workflow files before issuing VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED or VERIFICATION_REJECTED. This step closes the SMOKE-E2E-0001 execution phase and gates final closure on AUDITOR sign-off. Next roadmap phase advancement is contingent on VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED from AUDITOR.
proof_target: governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json on main branch with pass status for all validation checks; .github/workflows/auditor-runner.yml containing dispatch role filter (commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5) and server-side current_task.json update step (commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae); .github/workflows/analyst-verifier-runner.yml present (commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26); governance/ledger/ ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012
